name: Skill request

title: "[skill-request] "
labels: enhancement

## What problem does this solve?

<one paragraph: the research workflow gap, when it shows up, what's
currently painful>

## Why don't the existing 13 skills cover it?

<which existing skills are closest, and what they don't do>

## Proposed shape

- **Skill name:** `<proposed-name>`
- **Trigger phrases** (3-5 examples of how a user would phrase the request):
  - "..."
  - "..."
- **Inputs:**
- **Outputs** (file paths or chat-only):
- **Composes with** (which other skills consume this skill's output, if any):
- **Prerequisites** (CLI binary, API key, file format):

## Should it extend an existing skill or be a new skill?

<argue one way or the other; new skills bloat the catalog, but
extensions can dilute scope>

## Out of scope

<what this skill specifically should NOT do — surfaces hidden
ambiguity early>
